from __future__ import annotations


def monolithic_module_owns_parsing_validation_execution_and_rendering_positive(raw: str) -> str:
    key, value = raw.split("=", 1)
    data = {key: value}
    if "id" not in data:
        raise ValueError("missing id")
    result = f"done:{data}"
    return f"<p>{result}</p>"
